tender.description: Club Work (1) Repairing/rewinding of 250 KVA, 11 KV/ 433 V transformer Sr. No. 1547 make OMEC ENGINEER RANCHI installed at Kalyanpur coal dump village under CHP-CPP, Piparwar. (2) Repairing/rewinding of 06 No. induction motors (01) 15 KW 415 V, 3phas
